title: Add contact selector to mobile field and Product Type field to account info

requirements.summary: Add an icon button next to the mobile field that opens a dropdown displaying primary and secondary contact phone numbers
acceptanceCriteria: An icon button appears adjacent to the mobile field
Clicking the icon displays both primary and secondary contact phone numbers
The contact selector UI is visually consistent with the existing design system

file_operations.description: Add an icon button next to the mobile field in the customer detail section. Import and use a dropdown/popover component from shadcn/ui (such as Popover or DropdownMenu) to display primary and secondary contact phone numbers. Position the icon button adjacent to the mobile field and wire it to toggle the contact selector dropdown. Use the case data's primaryContact and secondaryContact fields to populate the dropdown options.

requirements.summary: Implement click functionality on contact options to populate the mobile field with the selected phone number
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a contact in the dropdown updates the mobile field value
The dropdown closes after selecting a contact
The mobile field displays the selected contact number

file_operations.description: Add state management for the mobile field value using useState. Implement click handlers on the contact options in the dropdown that update the mobile field state with the selected phone number and close the dropdown. Ensure the mobile field displays the updated value after selection.

requirements.summary: Set the primary contact as the default value for the mobile field on page load
acceptanceCriteria: The mobile field displays the primary contact phone number by default
The default value is set on initial page load

file_operations.description: Initialize the mobile field state with the primaryContact value from the case data when the component mounts or when case data becomes available. Use useEffect or direct initialization to set the default value to case.primaryContact.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Product Type' field label to the horizontal info area below Days Past Due
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Product Type' label appears in the horizontal info area
The field is positioned below the Days Past Due field
The layout maintains horizontal alignment and spacing consistency

file_operations.description: Add a 'Product Type' label in the horizontal info section that contains 'Days Past Due'. Position the new field below the Days Past Due field while maintaining the existing horizontal layout structure and spacing. Use the same styling patterns as the Days Past Due field for consistency.

requirements.summary: Display the product type value (Loan, Credit Card, or Overdrawn) below the Product Type label
acceptanceCriteria: The product type value is displayed below the 'Product Type' label
The value shows one of: 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn'
The styling is consistent with other field values in the section

file_operations.description: Display the productType value from the case data below the 'Product Type' label. Use the same text styling and layout as other field values in the horizontal info area to maintain visual consistency. The value will be one of 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn' as provided by the backend Case type.
